---
id: calculate-installment-programs-using-post
title: "Installment programs offers"
description: "When a customer wants to pay for a purchase by a loan and you want"
sidebar_label: "Installment programs offers"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Installment programs offers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/installmentProgramsOffers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



When a customer wants to pay for a purchase by a loan and you want 
to show him an offer of available installment programs, 
use `/financing/v1/installmentProgramsOffers` resource with properly 
filled request that contains at least following data:

- Product set code (you should know the proper product set code from 
Home Credit's sales representative or other similar source; 
if you don't provide product set code, your default product set will be used)
- Price of customer's purchase

If the request was successfully processed, you receive HTTP status code 200 
and array of objects of available installment programs with at least 
following information in the response:

- Installment program (array)
  - Installment program product code
  - Installment program type (in case of only one installment program offer 
  in response it is of type `FAVOURITE`)
  - Installment amount
  - Number of installments

In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 422         | UNPROCESSABLE | The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors |
| 500         | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["price"],"properties":{"downPayment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"price":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"InstallmentProgramsOffersRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"installmentPrograms":{"type":"array","description":"Array with installment programs offer","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"object","properties":{"annualInterestRate":{"type":"number","description":"Annual interest rate\ne.g. 0.17"},"installmentDay":{"type":"number","description":"Installment date (day in month)\ne.g. 20"},"installmentFirstDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Date of the first installment\ne.g. 2017-05-20"},"installmentLastDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Date of the last installment\ne.g. 2018-03-20"},"legalline":{"type":"string","description":"Text interpretation of the offer\ne.g.\n\"Uvedené hodnoty jsou spočítány k datu poskytnutí 18.1.2017, datu 1. splátky 20.1.2017 a se splatností všech dalších splátek k 20. dni v měsíci počítaje 20.1.2017. Nejedná se o nabídku či veřejnou nabídku. Platí při splnění podmínek Home Credit....\""},"paidBack":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"predictedProvisionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"Predicted provision date\ne.g. 2017-05-20"},"rpsn":{"type":"number","description":"RPSN\ne.g. 0.23"}},"title":"Detail"},"flags":{"type":"array","description":"Installment program flags","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"benefit":{"type":"string"},"delayFirstInstallment":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["BENEFIT","CLOSEST","DELAY_FIRST_INSTALLMENT","FAVOURITE","MINIMAL"]}},"title":"InstallmentProgramFlag"}},"installment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"numberOfInstallments":{"type":"number","description":"installment count"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Installment program product code"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Program type","enum":["MINIMAL","FAVOURITE","OTHER"]}},"title":"InstallmentProgram"}}},"title":"InstallmentProgramsResponse"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
